ValidationRule.description: The expensetracker can only track expense for himself if no permission set available
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, Expensetracker__r.User__r.Id <> $User.Id, $User.CanTrackExpensesForOthers__c =false, ExpenseValidatedProjectResponsible__c =false, ExpenseValidatedFinance__c =false, OR( ISNEW() , ISCHANGED(Expensetracker__c), ISCHANGED(ExpenseDate__c), ISCHANGED(ExpenseGross__c), ISCHANGED(PaymentType__c), ISCHANGED(BusinessReason__c), ISCHANGED(SupplierReceiverLocation__c), ISCHANGED(ListOfNames__c), ISCHANGED(ExpenseSubType__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can not add or change expenses for somebody else. (EC007)
